verses.text: A kha sagihna hong cin' ciangin Israel mite amau' khuapi ciatah teng khin uh ahih manin, khekhat khai bangin Jerusalem-ah hong kituah diam uh hi

Tua ciangin Jozadak' tapa Jeshua leh a siampipihte, leh Shealtiel' tapa Zerubbabel leh a behte hong kipan uh a, Pasian' mi Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin meihal biaknate piakna dingin Israel Pasian biakna tau a bawl uh hi
Amaute in tua gama midang tengte kihta uh ahih manin a mun lui mahah biakna tau phut pahin zing leh nitak simin Topa' tungah meihal biakna a pia uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a kikipsaksa bangin buk pawi bawl uh a, nisimin zat dingin a kisehsa zah bangin meihal biakna nisimin a pia uh hi
Tua ciangin hihte banah a tawntunga meihal biakna, Khadet sima biakna, leh Topa' pawi a kisehsa hun khempeuh leh Topa' tungah amau' utthu tawh a pia mite khempeuh' biaknate zong a pia uh hi
Topa' biakinnpi a bul a kiphuh nailoh hangin a kha sagihna a ni masa ni-a kipanin amaute in Topa' tungah meihal biaknate piak ding kipan uh hi

Tua hi a, amaute in suangseekte leh khutsiamte tungah sum pia uh a, Persia kumpi Sairas' tung panin a thu ngahna bangun Lebanon mualtung gam panin tuipi gei Joppa khua-ah taamtak singte a hong puaksuk ding Sidon khuamite leh Taia khuamite tungah zong annek tuidawn leh sathau a pia uh hi.

Amaute, Jerusalem khua-a Pasian' biakinn-ah a hong ciahkik uh a kum nihna, tua kum a kha nihna sungin Shealtiel' tapa Zerubbabel leh Jozadak' tapa Jeshua, nasep kipan uh a, a Israel mipihte, siampite, Levi mite, leh salsuahna panin Jerusalem-ah a hong ciahkik mite khempeuh in zong a huh uh hi. Amaute in Levi mite kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah peuhmah Topa' biakinn sungah biakna nasepte a vaan dingin a seh uh hi
Jeshua a tapate leh a behte tawh, leh Hodaviah-te beh Kadmiel leh a tate in Henadad' tapate leh Levi mi a tapate uh leh a behte uh tawh Pasian' biakinn-ah nasemte tungah ukna tavuan a lakhawm uh hi

Innlamte in Topa' biakinn a bul a phuh uh ciangin, Israel kumpipa David in a geelkholhsa bangin Topa a phat dingin siampite in a puan uh silhin peengkul tawh, Asaf' tapa Levi mite daltuah tawh a pan'mun ding uhah hong pang uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in Topa phatna leh lungdam kohna a kidawngin sa uh a, “ Topa hoih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te hong itna kip tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi. Topa' biakinn bulpi kiphut khin ahih manin mi khempeuh in nakpi takin Topa phat uh hi

Midang tampi lungdamin a aw neih zahun a kiko uh hangin a biakinn masa a mu ngeisa siampite, Levi mite, leh innkuan lutang, midang tampite in hih biakinn bulpi a kiphuh a muh uh ciangin kapin a thum uh hi
Mite nakpi takin kiko ahih manin lungdamna awging, leh kahna leh thumna awgingte mite in khen theilo uh hi. Gamlapi pek panin tua awgingte a kiza hi.
